title: Texture Loader Plus
description: Load PSD, TIFF, and other image formats as textures in Minecraft. Aimed at resource pack creators.
body: Texture Loader Plus allows resource pack creators to use PSD, TIFF, and PNM files directly as textures in Minecraft. No need to export to PNG – just drop your Photoshop files into your resource pack! Features smart caching for fast reloading and configurable format priority. Perfect for streamlining your texture workflow.
